ModMetaData.name: PriorityClean - Universal Patch
ModMetaData.author: Gadolinium
ModMetaData.description:
PriorityClean - Universal Patch
Adds PriorityCleaning to races that can clean, including RimWorld 1.6 colony mechs. Includes compatibility runtime support for PriorityClean workgiver checks and life-stage cleaning restrictions.
